aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to insufficient conversational content and missing structured data. The website lacks the depth and format needed for AI models to confidently recommend it.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content with structured data (FAQPage schema).
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-maintained but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement to boost visibility.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No Service schema for detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips and local service recommendations.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ content with FAQPage schema.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as local HVAC expert by adding detailed service guides and HowTo content with structured data.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top answer for local HVAC queries.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and conversational content are being cited by AI models, while your site is overlooked.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, FAQ content, and authority-building strategies to make your business the go-to HVAC expert in AI search results.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.
